changeSet.author: alyona
changeSet.sql:
CREATE OR ALTER TRIGGER trg_project_events_counter ON events AFTER INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE AS BEGIN SET NOCOUNT ON;
UPDATE p SET active_events_count = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events e WHERE e.project_id = p.id AND e.is_cancelled = 0 ) FROM projects p WHERE p.id IN ( SELECT project_id FROM inserted WHERE project_id IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT project_id FROM deleted WHERE project_id IS NOT NULL ); END;
